keywords.job: I am chief rotwormtamer of Kazordoon. I sell rotworms and buy meat and tasty, fresh rats for my worms.
keywords.name: I am Humgolf Molesight, Son of Earth, from the Molten Rock.
keywords.tibia: More nice beneath this noisy green surface.
keywords.big: The mountain seems tasty as far as my worms are concerned.
keywords.old: The mountain seems tasty as far as my worms are concerned.
keywords.worms: They are so cute and so intelligent.
keywords.humans: They are not cute and not intelligent.
keywords.orcs: They are even more stupid and ugly than minotaurs.
keywords.elves: They are not worth to be mentioned.
keywords.geomancer: They have an understanding of worms.
keywords.god: The worm does not care about gods, why should I?
keywords.earth: Home of the worms, home of my people, too.
keywords.fire: Where earth is giving, fire is taking. That's the way of the elements.
keywords.buy: Do you want to buy a rotworm?
keywords.rotworm: Do you want to buy a rotworm?
keywords.drilling: I am not allowed to sell worms to people without a formular 007 licence to drill or a 0815 artist licence.
keywords.licence: It's a special licence for artists. It was only used once as I sold a white worm to Frietsiek and Yor.
keywords.007: I am not allowed to sell worms to people without a formular 007 licence to drill or a 0815 artist licence.
keywords.0815: It's a special licence for artists. It was only used once as I sold a white worm to Frietsiek and Yor.
keywords.artist: It's a special licence for artists. It was only used once as I sold a white worm to Frietsiek and Yor.
keywords.life: Can't say I like it much.
keywords.plant: Only a rotting plant is a good plant.
keywords.citizen: Many noisy pepole down here are scaring my worms.
keywords.kroox: Poor guy, has lost his drilling licence for drinking.
keywords.jimbin: His tavern is too crowded and too bright for a dwarf with taste like me.
keywords.maryza: Don't like the way she looks at my worms.
keywords.bezil: Always chatting. How can someone talk that much?
keywords.nezil: Always chatting. How can someone talk that much?
keywords.uzgod: We are trading now and then. Fine dwarf he is.
keywords.etzel: Does a worm need spells to work his kind of magic? I do neither.
keywords.motos: That guy is a monster! I despise rotwormkillers.
keywords.general: That guy is a monster! I despise rotwormkillers.
keywords.durin: If he'd live today he'd be a rotwormtamer like me.
keywords.duria: Thinks she's to good to talk to rotwormtamers.
keywords.emperor: The emperor should spend more money on rotworm husbandry.
keywords.kruzak: The emperor should spend more money on rotworm husbandry.
keywords.technomancer: GO AWAY! I heard they think of replacing worms with machines. That is an OUTRAGE!
keywords.army: They should remember old dwarfish rotworm tactics. Think like a worm and the battle is almost won.
keywords.colossus: Never was up there to look at it.
keywords.ferumbras: A true enemy of the worms.
keywords.news: Who needs news if the old things are still good enough?
keywords.stone: Too hard to be gnawed away by even the finest worm.
keywords.golem: Too hard to be gnawed away by even the finest worm.
keywords.help: I am here to help the worms, not the fools.
keywords.quest: What by the worm are you talking about?
keywords.task: What by the worm are you talking about?
keywords.what: What by the worm are you talking about?
keywords.do: What by the worm are you talking about?
keywords.gold: Gold is one of the things my worms can unearth.
keywords.money: Gold is one of the things my worms can unearth.
keywords.equipment: If you own a good worm you need nothing else.
keywords.time: Time does not matter to a dwarf who understands the ways of the worm.

texts: I am chief rotwormtamer of Kazordoon. I sell rotworms and buy meat and tasty, fresh rats for my worms.

entries.response: Hey, you don't own a drilling licence. No deal!
